authorization.historicalAuthorizationClaim: execution log states user continued authorization for the no-secret scaffold

actionsExecuted: created restricted production secret directory with mode 700 if absent
created docker-compose.deepseek-runtime.yml under the production app root
did not create the production secret file
did not run docker compose up
did not restart or recreate scm-governance-workbench

publicStatus.historicalFieldCoverage: authorization and availability fields were not recorded in the original evidence

decision.reason: The no-secret scaffold is ready, but the actual server-side secret file is still absent and the running container has not been recreated.
decision.nextGate: Ops writes the real secret file and verifies configured=true; before any live smoke, separately authorize the provider call and target-workbench SQLite trace/run writes, then require providerCallAuthorized=true, databaseWriteAuthorized=true, and available=true.

rollback.proposedProcedure: disable or remove the Compose override, remove the secret directory only if it is empty and unused, then verify health and provider status
